definition: Tasks passing task-specific acceptance and regression guardrails divided by eligible attempted tasks
decision_use: Primary quality outcome; compare by task class, mode, model, and cost band

definition: Active review, steering, and intervention minutes divided by accepted verified changes
decision_use: Tests whether the platform reduces the true scarce resource

definition: Model, sandbox, and external-tool cost divided by accepted verified changes
decision_use: Prevents multi-agent quality gains from hiding uneconomic execution

definition: Router-selected multi-agent runs that beat or match the single-agent counterfactual under quality/cost utility
decision_use: Gate automatic routing and identify task classes where coordination pays

definition: Forced-failure runs that resume from the latest safe checkpoint and reach a valid terminal state
decision_use: Gate workflow GA and always-on operation

definition: Accepted agent changes reverted or linked to a confirmed regression within the review window
decision_use: Prevents throughput optimization from reducing downstream quality

definition: Policy-relevant actions executed despite a deny or escalation rule divided by policy-relevant actions
decision_use: Release-blocking security measure; controlled-suite target is zero
